title: NPU nm1 ReLU6 vec enable
hypothesis: A bounded int8 ReLU6 op can be integrated into the fixed nm1 vec path and physically characterized as a relu6-enabled NPU block, providing the correct architecture_block physical source before any later ReLU6 mapper or terminal-output evaluation.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can we produce an accepted ReLU6-enabled nm1 design point with real physical metrics before any Layer 2 ReLU6 campaign runs?
include: one bounded ReLU6-enabled nm1 block design/config variant
one focused Layer 1 physical sweep on that integrated design
exclude: broad nonlinear-family claims beyond bounded ReLU6 enablement
follow_on_broad_sweep: return to Layer 2 ReLU6 or broader terminal-family work only after this integrated physical source is accepted

expected_result.reason: the goal is to establish the first accepted relu6-enabled nm1 block physical metrics
